app.title: Edit store price tags using Flipper Zero
app.author: trueduke
app.description: Edit store price tags using Flipper Zero
proposed_tests: Clone TagTinker, install dependencies, run on a real-world store tag
Compare TagTinker output vs manually editing tags
Compare TagTinker vs alternative price tag editors
